task_completion.description: The agent created the three required domain folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the email client's folder pane (usually on the left), there are folders named exactly 'Domain-srv0.ems.ed.ac.uk', 'Domain-eircom.net', and 'Domain-2ubh.com'.

task_completion.description: Emails from srv0.ems.ed.ac.uk were moved to its respective folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The folder 'Domain-srv0.ems.ed.ac.uk' is shown containing exactly 3 emails, or the agent is seen moving 3 emails into this folder.

task_completion.description: Emails from eircom.net were moved to its respective folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The folder 'Domain-eircom.net' is shown containing exactly 3 emails, or the agent is seen moving 3 emails into this folder.

task_completion.description: Emails from 2ubh.com were moved to its respective folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The folder 'Domain-2ubh.com' is shown containing exactly 2 emails, or the agent is seen moving 2 emails into this folder.

task_completion.description: The agent composed an email with the correct recipient and subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email composition window (or sent email) shows 'audit-compliance@yourcompany.com' in the 'To' field and 'Inbox Domain Audit Report' in the 'Subject' field.

task_completion.description: The audit email body contains the correct domains and email counts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email body explicitly lists the domains 'srv0.ems.ed.ac.uk' (3 emails), 'eircom.net' (3 emails), and '2ubh.com' (2 emails).

task_completion.description: The audit email body contains a one-sentence characterization for each domain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Next to or below each of the three domains in the email body, there is a brief sentence describing the type or nature of the correspondence.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical email client to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a genuine email client interface being used to view emails, create folders, and compose the report, rather than a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass GUI interaction for folder creation or email moving.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing python scripts, bash scripts, or direct file manipulation (like `mv` or `mkdir`) used to solve the task.

integrity.description: The agent actually characterized the emails rather than using placeholder text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The characterization sentences in the email body appear to be based on actual email content, not generic placeholders like 'Type of correspondence goes here'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The top 3 sender domains by frequency in the inbox are: 'srv0.ems.ed.ac.uk' (3 emails), 'eircom.net' (3 emails), and '2ubh.com' (2 emails). The required folder names are exactly 'Domain-srv0.ems.ed.ac.uk', 'Domain-eircom.net', and 'Domain-2ubh.com'. The audit email must be sent to 'audit-compliance@yourcompany.com' with the subject 'Inbox Domain Audit Report'.
